🐱 Tracy, CA & Bay Area
🐾 🐾 🐾 🐾 🐾
Hello, I'm Fatimah ✨

Obsessed with cats,
in love with coffee

Caffeinated Cats started with a dream — one day, a full cat café where you can sip a perfect latte with a purring friend by your side. Until then, we're bringing that warm, cozy café experience straight to your events.

Whether it's your wedding, a baby shower, a corporate gathering, or a community pop-up, we show up with quality drinks, good vibes, and plenty of cat-themed love.

📍 Based in Tracy, CA — proudly serving the Bay Area and San Joaquin County.

Book Us For Your Event →

"We bring the café experience to you!"

— Fatimah, Owner & Founder

  • Weddings & Elopements
  • Baby & Bridal Showers

What We Do

The Full Café Experience,
Wherever You Are

We set up our mobile coffee cart at your event and serve handcrafted drinks that keep your guests buzzing — with love.

💍

Weddings

Make your special day even sweeter with a bespoke coffee bar your guests will rave about.

🎀

Showers

Baby showers, bridal showers — we'll set the most adorable caffeinated scene.

🏢

Corporate

Keep your team energized and impressed at your next company event or meeting.

🌟

Pop-Ups

Catch us at community pop-up events around the Bay Area and San Joaquin Valley.

🎉

Private Events

Birthday parties, celebrations, or anything in between — we're there for it.

☕

Custom Setups

Have something unique in mind? Let's talk — we love bringing creative visions to life.

What We're Serving

Our Menu

Our menu changes with the seasons — check back for what's fresh. See a past drink you loved? Reach out and we'll see what we can do!

Current

Matcha Latte

Ask us!

Ceremonial grade matcha with your choice of milk — smooth, earthy, and perfectly balanced.

Current

Lavender Latte

Ask us!

House-made lavender syrup with espresso and steamed milk. Floral, cozy, unforgettable.

Current

Classic Espresso

Ask us!

Rich, bold, and beautifully pulled. The foundation of everything we do.

Current

Brown Sugar Oat Latte

Ask us!

Espresso, oat milk, and house-made brown sugar cinnamon syrup. A crowd favorite.

📝 Fatimah — update the menu items above anytime by editing this file!
